records.ety: [L. phantasma. See Phantom, and cf. Fantasm.]

defs: An image formed by the mind, and supposed to be real or material; a shadowy or airy appearance; sometimes, an optical illusion; a phantom; a dream.
quotes: They be but phantasms or apparitions.

defs: A mental image or representation of a real object; a fancy; a notion.
quotes: Figures or little features, of which the description had produced in you no phantasm or expectation.
